title: AddSkill Variant Handler Field Analysis
description: Field layout analysis for AddSkill effect handlers (AddSkillOnUseHandler, AddSkillAfterMovementHandler, AddItemSlotHandler) and their base class AddSkillHandler

0x10.name: Skill
0x10.description: Reference to the owning skill instance

0x18.name: Template
0x18.description: Reference to the template defining this handler's behavior

AddSkillHandler.description: Generic handler for adding skills based on various trigger events

values.0: OnApply - When skill is applied to target
values.1: WhenAdded - When this handler is added to parent skill
values.3: WhenRemoved - When parent skill is removed/expires

0x60.name: SkillToAdd
0x60.description: The skill template to instantiate and add

0x68.name: OnlyApplyOnHit
0x68.description: If true, skill only added when hit is confirmed (Event=0 OnApply)

0x6a.name: NonCritOnly
0x6a.description: If true, does not trigger on critical hits

0x6b.name: OnlyOnDamage
0x6b.description: If true, requires damage > 0 to trigger

0x6c.name: DoNotAddIfAlreadyHasSkill_Self
0x6c.description: Prevents duplicate when adding to self

0x70.name: Condition
0x70.description: Optional condition evaluated as (actor, target, skill)

0x78.name: ShowOnHUD
0x78.description: If true, shows skill name on target HUD when added

0x80.name: TargetRequiresOneOfTheseTags
0x80.description: Target must have at least one of these tags

0x88.name: TargetCannotHaveOneOfTheseTags
0x88.description: Target must not have any of these tags

0x90.name: CheckIsApplicableOnVerifyTarget
0x90.description: If true, validates target during targeting phase

AddSkillToSelf.description: Core logic for self skill addition

AddSkillOnUseHandler.description: Adds a skill when any skill is used, optionally filtered by skill type

0x58.name: SkillToAdd
0x58.description: The skill template to instantiate and add

0x60.name: SkillFilter
0x60.description: Optional filter to match against the used skill

OnAnySkillUsed.description: Triggered when any skill is used, validates against filter and adds skill

AddSkillOnUseHandler.behavior: Listens for skill usage events. If SkillFilter is null or matches the used skill, creates SkillAddedEvent and adds new skill to actor.

AddSkillAfterMovementHandler.description: Adds a skill to the actor after they complete movement

0x58.name: SkillToAdd
0x58.description: The skill template to instantiate and add after movement

OnMovementFinished.description: Triggered when any entity finishes movement

AddSkillAfterMovementHandler.behavior: Subscribes to TacticalManager.OnMovementFinished event. When owner actor completes movement, adds skill from template if not already present.

AddItemSlotHandler.description: Adds or removes item slots from an entity's inventory

0x58.name: SlotType
0x58.description: The type of item slot to add/remove

OnAdded.description: Adds slots when handler is attached

OnRemoved.description: Removes slots when handler is detached

AddItemSlotHandler.behavior: Checks entity type (Infantry/Vehicle) and validates slot type compatibility using ItemSlotExtensions.IsInfantryItemSlot/IsVehicleItemSlot. Calls ItemContainer.AddSlots/RemoveSlots.

created_skill_fields.description: Fields set on newly created skill instances

0xC8.name: SkillAddedEvent
0xC8.description: Event data for tracking skill addition source

0xE8.name: CasterActor
0xE8.description: The actor who cast the originating skill

0xF0.name: SourceSkill
0xF0.description: The skill that caused this skill to be added
